intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2:00 at 50%. Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 2:00 at 50%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2 endurance. 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable all day.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 21% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 50% for 2:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 2:00 at 50%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 2:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 21% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 2:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 2:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 24% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 24% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 28% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 16 minutes of work done. 39 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 31% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 50%, 85-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 35% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 2:00 at 50%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 50% for 2:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 35% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 2:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 2:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 2:00 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 22 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 42% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 2:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 2:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 2:00 at 50%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 49% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 49% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 49% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 49% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 52% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 52% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 52% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 52% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 56% done. 0 intervals left. 23 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 32 minutes of work done. 23 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 2:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 23 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 59% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 50% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 59% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 59% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 59% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 36 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 19 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 63% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 63% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 36 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 66% complete. 17 minutes left. Zone 2 is like compound interest — boring but effective.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. 70% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 66% done. 17 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 38 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 66% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 40 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 73% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 10:00 at 65%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This easy work is the foundation. 65%, Seated. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 10:00 at 65%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 5 minutes to go. Easy does it. 65% FTP. Build your engine.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 91% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 91% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 91% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 91% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
